assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores in production
assertions.rationale: States 'you should use a persistent store for production'.
Does not implement ISamlServiceProviderStore. Creates a plain class without implementing the interface.

assertions.assertion: The store class has a FindByEntityIdAsync method that accepts a string entityId and CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: Method is named GetByEntityIdAsync (wrong name) and has no CancellationToken parameter.
Registers as AddScoped<SamlServiceProviderDbStore>() instead of using AddSamlServiceProviderStore<T>().

assertions.assertion: Uses EF Core (DbContext) for data access
assertions.rationale: Uses AppDbContext extending DbContext with EF Core.
